title: KZ-1B runner validation
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/runners')
missing = []
invalid = []
for i in range(1, 15):
    path = base / f'kz1_runner_{i:02d}.py'
    if not path.exists():
        missing.append(str(path))
        continue
    text = path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    if 'RUNNER_ID' not in text or 'status' not in text or 'print' not in text:
        invalid.append(str(path))
status = 'completed' if not missing and not invalid else 'blocked'
state = Path('governance/state/KZ1B_RUNNER_SKELETON_VALIDATION.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'KZ-1B','trace_id':'kz1b_runner_skeleton_validation','status':status,'release_pass':False,'missing':missing,'invalid':invalid,'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'KZ-2 governance runner manifest' if status == 'completed' else 'KZ-1 repair missing or invalid runners'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/KZ1B_RUNNER_SKELETON_VALIDATION.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# KZ-1B | Runner skeleton validation\nStatus: ' + status + '\nMissing: ' + str(missing) + '\nInvalid: ' + str(invalid) + '\nNo .github/workflows files touched.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
if ctx.exists():
    ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8').rstrip() + '\n## KZ-1B completed | 2026-06-04\nRunner skeleton validation status: ' + status + '. Missing=' + str(missing) + '; Invalid=' + str(invalid) + '. Workflow lock respected. Next: KZ-2 governance runner manifest.\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(ctx))
"""No issue comments.
